changed_signals.de_escalation_watch:
NO DE-ESCALATION ON ANY FRONT (Day 16 20:04):
- Iran: Gulf states intercept new wave. Iran threatens 3 Emirati ports (non-US). Zero diplomacy.
- Pakistan-Afghanistan: Overnight Kandahar strikes, 12 soldiers killed. No ceasefire.
- Israel-Lebanon: South Lebanon pounded. 826+ dead.
- Russia-Ukraine: Ukraine strikes Crimea S-400 + Krasnodar oil station. Intensifying strikes.
- DPRK: MRL test earlier. No de-escalation.
- China: US-China trade talks in Paris — sole de-escalation signal globally.
- TEN trackers at imminent/critical. ONE de-escalation signal (China trade talks).

latest_news.headline: Gulf states (Bahrain, Saudi, UAE) intercept new wave of Iranian missiles and drones
latest_news.text: Bahrain, Saudi Arabia and UAE told residents they were working to intercept incoming projectiles. Day after Iran threatened 3 Emirati ports — first time threatening a neighbor's non-US assets. Iran escalating Gulf targeting.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine strikes S-400 launcher in Crimea + Tikhoretsk oil pumping station in Krasnodar
latest_news.text: Ukrainian forces struck S-400 radar systems and launcher in occupied Crimea. Separately hit Tikhoretsk oil pumping station in Krasnodar Krai overnight. ISW: Ukraine intensifying mid-range strike campaign to degrade Russian air defenses ahead of spring-summer offensive.

latest_news.headline: Pakistan overnight strikes Kandahar — Taliban retaliates on military camp
latest_news.text: Pakistan targeted militant hideouts at 22 locations in Kandahar, Paktia, Nangarhar, Khost, and Paktika. 12 Pakistani soldiers killed, 27 wounded, 1 missing. Taliban retaliated with attack on military camp. Fighting 'shows no signs of abating.'

latest_news.headline: FM Araghchi: 'We never asked for ceasefire' — ready for long war
latest_news.text: FM Araghchi on Face the Nation: 'We never asked for ceasefire, never asked for negotiation. Ready to defend as long as it takes.' Refutes Trump claim Iran was 'ready to make a deal.'

latest_news.headline: Russia fires 68 missiles + 282 guided bombs + 9,222 drones in 24h — 6 killed in Kyiv region
latest_news.text: Russia hammered Ukraine with missiles and drones. Five killed in Kyiv region — Zelenskyy said energy infrastructure, residential buildings, schools and businesses damaged.

latest_news.headline: Zelensky warns Iran war could threaten Ukraine's ability to fight back
latest_news.text: Zelensky warns that the Iran conflict is diverting US resources and attention, potentially undermining Ukraine's ability to defend against Russia.

latest_news.headline: Kim Jong Un oversees 12x 600mm nuclear-capable MRL test — 3rd provocation this week
latest_news.text: Kim Jong Un presided over drill of 12x 600mm nuclear-capable MRLs with daughter Kim Ju Ae. Response to US-South Korea Freedom Shield exercises.

latest_news.headline: Israel pounds south Lebanon — no ceasefire signals
latest_news.text: Israel continues strikes on south Lebanon. 826+ killed. No ceasefire or diplomatic off-ramps.

outlook:
CRITICAL — Global war probability 86% (Day 16 20:04). WAR ENTERS DAY 17 — MULTI-FRONT ESCALATION:

(1) IRAN → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): Gulf states intercept new Iranian missile/drone wave. Iran threatens 3 Emirati ports (first non-US Gulf targets). Israel expands Isfahan strikes. Zero diplomacy.

(2) ISRAEL-LEBANON → IMMINENT 100 (capped, RISING): South Lebanon pounded. 826+ dead. No ceasefire.

(3) RUSSIA-UKRAINE → IMMINENT 91 (RISING, +5): Ukraine strikes S-400 in Crimea + Tikhoretsk oil station. Zelensky warns Iran war threatens Ukraine's defense. Intensifying mid-range strike campaign.

(4) PAKISTAN-AFGHANISTAN → IMMINENT 91 (RISING): Overnight Kandahar strikes. 12 Pakistani soldiers killed. Taliban retaliates. No ceasefire.

(5) RUSSIA → IMMINENT 77. (6) TURKEY → IMMINENT 78.

(7) DPRK → CRITICAL 55 (RISING): MRL test earlier. No new provocation this cycle.

(8) INDIA → ELEVATED 25.

ZERO DIPLOMATIC OFF-RAMPS ON 7 OF 8 FRONT. Gulf escalation widening — Bahrain, Saudi now intercepting Iranian fire alongside UAE. Day 17 grinding on.
